expected_detections.name: Debugger Detection
expected_detections.description: Code attempts to detect if it is being debugged and exits to evade analysis
indicators: Process list scanning for debugger names

expected_detections.name: Credential Theft
expected_detections.description: Underlying payload steals SSH private keys after evading debugging

notes: Anti-debugging is a classic malware evasion technique. Legitimate code rarely needs to detect and exit when debugged.
